kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: 5 coins goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Fletcher, and Millpond.
Wulfric goes with at least one of Carpenter, Bridgegate, or 7 coins.
If Matilda belongs to the North Side, then 7 coins does not go with Weaver.
Either 5 coins goes with Fletcher or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with Cedric (but not both).
Edmund does not go with 4 coins if and only if Cedric goes with 6 coins.
Blacksmith, Fletcher, and Riverside go with Cedric, Godfrey, and Wulfric, in some order.
At least two members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the River Ward.
Aldric's levy is lower than both the Blacksmith and the artisan in Kingsford.
4 coins, 7 coins, and 9 coins go with Aldric, Edmund, and Wulfric, in some order.
Exactly two of Edmund, the Blacksmith, the Potter, and the artisan with 6 coins belong to the North Side.
7 coins goes with at least two of Aldric, Weaver, and Bridgegate.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: 4 lb goes with exactly two of Esther, Catfish, and Stillwater.
Wade goes with at least one of Bluegill, Birchpool, or 6 lb.
If Royce belongs to the Highland Basin, then 6 lb does not go with Trout.
Either 4 lb goes with Catfish or someone in the Pike Family goes with Cody (but not both).
Dale does not go with 3 lb if and only if Cody goes with 5 lb.
Bass, Catfish, and Willowmere go with Cody, Esther, and Wade, in some order.
At least two members of the Sunfish Family are in the South Watershed.
Boone's weight is lower than both the angler who landed the Bass and the angler at Pinehollow.
3 lb, 6 lb, and 8 lb go with Boone, Dale, and Wade, in some order.
Exactly two of Dale, the angler who landed the Bass, the angler who landed the Perch, and the catch with 5 lb belong to the Highland Basin.
6 lb goes with at least two of Boone, Trout, and Birchpool.
